recentTweets.text:
Patricia Rojas is a Documented Dreamer. She was forced to self-deport — despite having lived in the U.S. nearly her entire life.

My bill would protect thousands like Patricia whose families came to this country legally.
 
Read more: https://t.co/BerDdG3YNE https://t.co/yzxHrFdOL8

Todd Blanche faces the Senate today.

From Trump's slush fund to the mishandling of the Epstein files and Ghislaine Maxwell's shady prison transfer, the evidence is clear: the Senate must vote NO on confirming him as Attorney General. https://t.co/jByttJ5elJ

Joan Sebastian Guerrero was a 26-year-old father who did the right things to be in this country legally. He wasn't the target of a warrant, yet he was shot and killed by ICE.

Trump's ICE is out of control and not making our communities safer.

A federal judge just ruled that Trump’s IRS immunity deal + slush fund amounts to “self-dealing.”

This scam is so appalling that the judge is referring Trump’s lawyers for sanctions.

Trump wants to reward the architect of it all—Todd Blanche—by making him Attorney General.

Child exploitation. Human trafficking. Drug Smuggling. Cartels.

All of these issues of public safety are losing staff and resources to feed this admin's ruthless agenda against immigrants.

Americans who care about addressing crime find this unacceptable. https://t.co/KkP56UjpNV

Despite Trump's attempts to block it, historic, bipartisan legislation to lower housing costs is now law.

Trump refused to sign this package because he wants Republicans to pass an extreme voter suppression bill. He failed, and the American people won. https://t.co/fh5f82KN1P

Kids don't always have access healthy meals—especially once the school year ends. That's why I visited the Poe Center's summer feeding program.

Following Republican cuts to food assistance, the Poe Center is stepping up to make sure NC children do not go hungry. https://t.co/vxdOPERTWO

Thank you to those who attended Tuesday night's town hall in Morrisville.

From housing to healthcare, costs are continuing to skyrocket, and residents across Wake County are spread too thin. I appreciated all who made their voices heard. https://t.co/OzWdbqR7ZS

I was proud to join @caryncgov Mayor Weinbrecht and @wakegov Chair Don Mial to announce over $1 million in federal funding for Walnut Creek.

Since the 90s, Cary and Raleigh residents have worked to restore Walnut Creek. This funding shows what we can achieve when communities and https://t.co/tjfBMckVha

It was an honor to present the N.C. Council of Women with a commemorative flag to honor their contributions to our nation.

As we celebrate America's 250th birthday, it is essential to recognize the role of women in shaping America's past and defining our future. https://t.co/zdDfVWHlJT

I had a great time celebrating America’s 250th anniversary at Capitol 250 Freedom Fest in Raleigh.

This milestone serves as an opportunity to come together, reflect on our history, and remember that the work of building a more perfect union is never done. https://t.co/Mfq1v49XNt

Despite what this administration says, the war with Iran isn't over.

I attended a briefing with Marco Rubio & Steve Witkoff, where they refused to answer legitimate questions about our security, economy, and impacts on our allies. https://t.co/4r0uc100Kd

Join me on Tuesday, July 7th for a Town Hall in Morrisville!  I want to hear from you about the issues that matter most to you and your family.  RSVP HERE: https://t.co/PDL5t89F41 https://t.co/1QDQFIhavN

Congratulations to Wake County's own, Rio Byrd, on bringing home 4 gold medals in powerlifting at this year's Special Olympics!

Her strength and endurance are an inspiration to our entire community, and we are proud to celebrate this success alongside her.

Congratulations to Morrisville on being named a 2026 All-America City!

This award is well-deserved recognition of Morrisville's strong sense of community and its commitment to investing in local programs that bring residents together.
 
https://t.co/xM5lbMZjll

It was all hands on deck to introduce a consequential piece of legislation: a House resolution to commemorate the Carolina Hurricanes' historic Stanley Cup Championship.

Congress must unanimously agree: Canes in six! https://t.co/cZvLHeAOn1

Birthright citizenship is enshrined in the Constitution and no president has the authority to unilaterally strip it away. 

The United States has been strengthened by those who come here in search of opportunity, and today's decision reaffirms that our Constitution, not the

RT @ReubenJones1: Reaction from @RepDeborahRoss on Duke Energy pulling out of the offshore wind Carolina Long Bay project: 

"Another offsh…
RT @DukePress: Watch @RepDeborahRoss honor Allen Paul, co-author of "Miracle Road," a history of RTP that comes out in the fall. Paul passe…

Another offshore wind project cancellation that could have lowered costs, created jobs, and powered homes. Instead, the Trump admin is giving Duke Energy millions in taxpayer dollars to invest in other types of energy.

I've been investigating whether these conditional https://t.co/S2JPgZxi05

Amidst attacks on voting rights that have become all too common, this decision is a welcome victory for our democracy. 
 
It’s a reminder that protecting every American’s right to vote is always worth fighting for. We’ll keep pushing back against every effort to undermine it.

On the anniversary of Obergefell v. Hodges, we celebrate the historic victory of marriage equality — a right that is only 11 years old.
 
As LGBTQ+ rights face renewed attacks, we must recommit to fighting discrimination and protecting the freedom to marry the person you love.
RT @NC_Governor: When our boys brought home the Stanley Cup, Caniacs proved that Raleigh is ready for the big stage. The excitement, visito…
My statement on the Supreme Court's TPS ruling: https://t.co/YRYQdIpPSZ

I'm on Capitol Hill to do my job, but Trump sent Congress into chaos by deciding not to sign a bipartisan bill to lower housing costs.

He cares more about taking away Americans' voting rights than providing affordable housing. https://t.co/f64JR4qoLC

Both the House and the Senate have now said clearly: it's time to end Trump's illegal war in Iran.
 
This war is not over. In fact, the Pentagon just said it needs an additional $80 billion in taxpayer dollars to fund it. Enough is enough.

Republicans and Democrats came together to pass a landmark bill to make housing more affordable. But the President has decided his own interests are more important than lowering costs for the American people.
 
Trump is now standing directly in the way of affordable housing.

All season, the @Canes showed the grit and teamwork that define North Carolina — and proved that the South is hockey country.
 
I was proud to celebrate this historic victory on the House floor. https://t.co/ZUrzS6zdqM

It's been four years since the clocks were turned back on women's rights. Four years of mothers who had freedoms their daughters don't.
 
Since Dobbs, women have died after being denied life-saving care, including in North Carolina. Restrictions are only increasing.
 
We will

Air traffic control operators work diligently to keep travelers safe. But behind the scenes, they face infrastructure and facilities needs, raising serious health and safety concerns.
 
I had the opportunity to visit operators at RDU to hear firsthand how Congress can address https://t.co/lsYiV0Zti9

This is what can happen when North Carolinians stand up and demand fair utility rates.
 
While I'm glad things are moving in the right direction, an 11% rate hike is still nothing to celebrate.
 
The cost of living remains too high. NC families need costs lowered, not raised.
RT @NWSRaleigh: A special weather statement has been issued for Raleigh NC, Cary NC and  Wake Forest NC until 12:15 PM EDT https://t.co/WAJ…

I met with the American Chamber of Commerce in India to discuss the strong relationship between the American and Indian business communities.

North Carolina benefits greatly from collaboration across sectors with India. https://t.co/mUP8bsKyZO

Raleigh is a hockey town. 

I'm glad to hear that our small businesses also celebrated this weekend, reporting major boosts in sales from the parade.

There's nothing better than when good news leads to more good news for our community. https://t.co/Lk8iLtkk3W

Trump cut a deal to give himself and his family immunity for any past tax fraud—all while the American people pay their fair share.

The President shouldn’t be allowed to ignore the laws that every other American has to follow. https://t.co/S1C6qaPQsV

Honored to celebrate Juneteenth in Garner.

Juneteenth is more than marking a moment in history - it’s about recommitting to the fight for equality and justice for all. https://t.co/8dBMBB60kg

Happy Father's Day.

As the proud daughter of an Air Force veteran, my father taught me the values of hard work, service, and love of country. I would not be the person I am today without him. 

To all the dads and father figures in Wake County, have a great day! https://t.co/p3V3koecaI
Celebrating the Canes! Stanley Cup champs! https://t.co/7roVD6kPY6

On Juneteenth, we mark the end of slavery in the United States.

But the fight is far from over: we are continuing to witness real attacks across the country on the voting rights of Black Americans.

We won't rest until voter suppression ends.

Ghislaine Maxwell has undoubtedly received special treatment from this administration. She was moved to a cushy prison & Trump has reportedly considered giving her a pardon. 

Make no mistake: Trump is implicated in these files. A pardon of Maxwell will only solidify his guilt. https://t.co/ceRirI3eqY

I spoke with @NCNewsline after visiting the ICE facility in Cary to conduct oversight of the Trump administration’s immigration enforcement policies and implementation.

I plan to visit a larger facility in Georgia this summer to demand humane treatment for people detained there.
RT @SEEC: Today, SEEC's @RepCasten, @RepDeborahRoss, @RepKamlagerDove, @RepHerbConaway, & @RepDexterOR were warmly welcomed by the Presiden…

Ahead of the Dobbs anniversary, I met with reproductive rights advocates to discuss the latest attacks on women’s health. 
 
I will stand firm in the fight to restore a woman’s right to make her own medical decisions. https://t.co/WlAeDNbaA8

I was honored to present an award to @WRAL for their excellent reporting at @nabtweets' annual awards ceremony.
 
Local journalism helps shine a light on some of the most important issues affecting communities across the country. https://t.co/JimEJWc7ZY

I spent a fun day at the Knightdale African American Festival. This was a wonderful celebration of African American culture through food, live music, dancing, and art. Thank you to the town of Knightdale for bringing our community together! https://t.co/nAMF8mWaOE

Today marks 14 years of DACA. For many immigrants who only know a life in the U.S., this program ensures they can pursue the American dream.

But that promise has been replaced with fear & uncertainty under this admin. We need to create a pathway to citizenship for all Dreamers.

The DOJ is attempting a cover-up. 

I discovered a quiet policy change that now lets the AG approve prison transfers at their discretion.

This comes after they moved Ghislaine Maxwell to a prison that doesn't allow sex offenders. This is an attempt to cover their tracks. I will https://t.co/eCW9B198O0
LET'S GO CANES!  Stanley Cup Champions!

ICYMI: Alongside @ValerieFoushee, I called on AI companies to address chatbots that have encouraged users to carry out mass shootings, suicide, and other harmful actions.

We cannot allow AI to promote deadly and dangerous behavior with no recourse. We need accountability.

On Women Veterans Recognition Day, we honor the women who served our country with courage and distinction. 

I was grateful to hear from veterans and advocates about their experiences, as well as the work ahead to ensure every veteran gets the recognition and support they https://t.co/u9mWvmt7hV

We wrapped up Republicans' so-called "Fraud Week" in Washington.

This week, I co-sponsored a bill to block funding for one of Trump's biggest grifts: his slush fund to divert taxpayer dollars to political allies and January 6 rioters. https://t.co/dFnQAljUoo

NEWS: I uncovered that BOP is trying to cover its tracks with a new policy change that gives the Attorney General broad authority to transfer any prisoner.
 
Conveniently, it would allow the AG to do exactly what Todd Blanche did when DOJ moved Ghislaine Maxwell—a convicted sex https://t.co/hVnNAxLVdX
RT @KevinJFrey: In a letter to the BOP, @RepDeborahRoss writes that the new policy “raises troubling questions about the scope of the Attor…
RT @KevinJFrey: SCOOP: House Dems led by @RepDeborahRoss  want answers about a recent policy change at the Federal Bureau of Prisons, argui…

Trump's Energy Secretary couldn't answer how it benefits Americans to cancel clean energy projects across the country.

Canceling clean energy isn't efficiency. It's a political agenda at Americans' expense. https://t.co/LGI230Yg7c

This admin cut projects to build and study new energy sources—not because they weren't working, but because they were clean energy.

North Carolinians know clean energy shouldn't be political. As we face even higher gas and electricity costs, we deserve an explanation. https://t.co/bZRRYoVSrY

Republicans have named this week in Congress “Fraud Week.”

So this week, I’ll break down some of the worst fraud the Trump admin has committed.

Today, I’m starting with the pardons Trump has given to blatant criminals who have stolen and cheated the American people. https://t.co/kPMtsrydzm

From the mishandled release of the Epstein Files to Ghislaine Maxwell’s transfer to Club Fed, Congress needs to investigate AG nominee Todd Blanche’s concerning actions at DoJ.

He has clearly proven his loyalty to Donald Trump over his loyalty to the rule of law. https://t.co/tFyXAZlDBH
A set back is a setup for a comeback. And that's what is going to happen tonight for our Carolina Hurricanes.  Let's go Canes! https://t.co/IeNDQHAdf5
